title: Meetings
empty-filtered: No meetings match the current filters.

end-dialog.title: Force-end this meeting?
end-dialog.description-active: {count, plural, one {# participant is} other {# participants are}} currently in the room. They'll be disconnected immediately.
end-dialog.description-idle: The meeting status will be marked ENDED and its LiveKit room (if any) will be closed.

end-all-dialog.title: End every active meeting?
end-all-dialog.description: This will mark every meeting with status ACTIVE as ENDED and close their LiveKit rooms. Every participant currently in a call will be disconnected immediately.
end-all-dialog.active-summary: {count, plural, one {# meeting} other {# meetings}} currently active.
end-all-dialog.none-active: No active meetings right now — nothing will happen.

delete-dialog.title: Permanently delete this meeting?
delete-dialog.description: This removes the meeting row plus every chat message, attachment, and participant record attached to it. This cannot be undone.
delete-dialog.confirm-label: Type the meeting code <mono>{code}</mono> to confirm
